ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the project belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., disbursing, signed, pending approval) */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., public, private) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget of the project */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the project budget */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., natural resources, transportation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being funded */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date of funding */,
  "co_financer" TEXT /* Co-financer (if applicable) */,
  "co_financer_amount" REAL /* Co-financer amount (if applicable) */,
  "co_financer_date" TEXT /* Co-financer date (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., achieved, pending) */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, finance team, external partner) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., project performance, funding trends) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow stage */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the workflow belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow stage */,
  "stage_date" TEXT /* Date of the workflow stage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the workflow stage (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_workflow_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., pdf, docx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
